hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); BLOCKED='rm -rf|mkfs|dd if=|:(){ :|:& };:|chmod 777|curl.*|.*> /dev/sd|shutdown|reboot|passwd|useradd|userdel'; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi "$BLOCKED"; then echo "Potentially dangerous command blocked: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"defer"}}'

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi '(api[_-]?key|secret|password|token|credential)\s*='; then echo 'Command may expose secrets' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt // ""'); if echo "$PROMPT" | grep -qEi '(ignore previous|disregard|forget your instructions|system prompt)'; then echo 'Suspicious prompt pattern detected' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qEi '\.(env|pem|key|secret|credentials)$'; then echo '{"systemMessage":"Warning: A sensitive file was modified: '"$FILE"'"}'; fi
echo '{"systemMessage":"Security hooks are active. Dangerous commands and secret exposure will be blocked."}'
